Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

BagM Beih. 02, 083 [Almanac][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of column missing)
oo  (traces of 1 line)
o 2'2'

KIN 1 13 NA! 30 5 ⸢A⸣ x [...]

(o 2') Ululu (Month VI), the 1st (of which follows the 30th of the preceding month). The 13th, moonset-after-sunrise. The Moon, 5 ... [...].

o 3'3'

DU₆ 30 5 dele-bat ABSIN KUR 13 AN.GE₆ 30 ša₂ DIB 14 NA

(o 3') Tašritu (Month VII), (the 1st of which is identical with) the 30th (day of the preceding month). The 5th, Venus reaches the Furrow. The 13th, eclipse of the Moon that passes by. The 14th, moonset-after-sunrise.

o 4'4'

22 GU₄.U₄ ina KUR ina RIN₂ IGI 27 KUR <<GE₆>> 29 AN.GE₆ 20

(o 4') The 22nd, Mercury appears in the east in the Scales. The 27th, last-visibility-of-the-Moon. The 29th, eclipse of the Sun in the Scorpion, that passes by. <<The 27th, last-visibility-of-the-Moon.>> The 30th, the Bristle sets.

o 5'5'

ina GIR₂.TAB ša₂ DIB <<27 KUR>> 30!(20) MUL₂.MUL₂ ŠU₂

Reverse
r 1r 1

APIN 1 5 dele-bat RIN₂ KUR 8 AN x KUR 13 NA

(r 1) Arahsamnu (Month VIII), the 1st (of which follows the 30th of the preceding month). The 5th, Venus reaches the Scales. The 8th, Mars reaches .... The 13th, moonrise-before-sunset.

r 22

27 KUR 28 GENNA ina GIR₂.<TAB> IGI 29v mul₂BABBAR PA KUR

(r 2) The 27th, last-visibility-of-the-Moon. The 28th, Saturn appears in Scorpio. The 29th, the White Star (Jupiter) reaches Pabilsag.

r 33

GAN 30 1 dele-bat! ⸢GIR₂⸣.TAB KUR U₄ BI GU₄.U₄ ina KUR ina GIR₂.TAB ŠU₂

(r 3) Kislimu (Month IX), (the 1st of which is identical with) the 30th (day of the preceding month). The 1st, Venus reaches the Scorpion. That day, Mercury sets in the east (sic.) in the Scorpion.

(traces of 1 line)
(rest of reverse missing)
